message:
fix: bd show exits non-zero when issue not found (bd-j99oj)

When bd show --json was given a nonexistent issue ID, it printed an error
to stderr but exited 0 with empty stdout. This caused downstream consumers
like gt bd move to fail with "unexpected end of JSON input" when trying to
parse the empty output.

Now bd show exits non-zero in both JSON and non-JSON modes when no issues
are found. In JSON mode, it outputs a structured error object to stdout
via FatalErrorRespectJSON, giving callers parseable error information.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
